title: TEDS Plus
description: A Quality of Life client-side modpack!
body:
[![Available on Modrinth](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/available/modrinth_vector.svg)](https://modrinth.com/modpack/teds-plus)
[![Available on Curseforge](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/available/curseforge_vector.svg)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/teds-plus)

TEDS Plus is a fantastic modpack from things like playing with friends to fantastic support for mods. This modpack has it all. You can easily play with friends without a server! You will also get fantastic performance from a group of mods. This modpack is also a fantastic template for any mods or modpacks.

There are a few QoL focused features. These include:

Essential, a non-intrusive, quality of life mod that aims to improve your Minecraft playing and social experience.
You no longer need to host a paid minecraft server or host one on your machine, slowing it down. With the click of a button, your friends can join your minecraft worlds!

Enjoy the wonderful experience minecraft has to bring to you, but with mods that will help you out a lot.

This is the perfect modpack for anyone new to modding, or minecraft in general.

Do not repost this mod without credit / a link to this page. You can and are promoted to adapt and change this modpack, or even merge it with other modpacks, but please credit / have a link to this page!
\
If you want to make an official colab, like a special version, be sure to reach out with your version, and I would be happy to make it officially affiliated.

Installer for the vanilla launcher: [github.com/TeamTEDS/teds-plus-installer](https://github.com/TeamTEDS/teds-plus-installer/releases/latest)
  
[TEDS Lite](https://modrinth.com/modpack/teds-lite)
